title: MUHCS 2.0 CHUNGCHANG HRIATTIRNA

472/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 12th May, 2026 :Hon’ble Chief Minister kaihhruaina hnuaia February Ni 16, 2026-a neih, 29th Governing Body meeting in a rel angin, MUHCS 2.0 (April Ni 1, 2026 chin hnulam), ah chuan empanelled hospital ni lo (non-empanelled private hospital) te’n MUHCS hmangtu damlo an enkawl theih te chu :-

title: UNION MINISTER OF LAW AND JUSTICE MEETS NGOS AND COMMUNITY LEADERS IN MAMIT
content:
71/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit, 12 May 2026:The Union Minister of Law and Justice, Arjun Ram Meghwal, today held an important interaction meeting with NGO representatives and community leaders at the Tourist Lodge in Mamit.

During the meeting, the Minister met with leaders from major civil society organisations including MHIP, YMA, MUP, Village Council (VC), and MZP. He listened to the grievances, challenges, and concerns raised by the representatives regarding the welfare and development of the people in the district.

Addressing the gathering, Pu Arjun Ram Meghwal stated that the Central Government remains committed to supporting the people of Mizoram and assured that all possible assistance would be extended wherever necessary. He emphasized that solving the problems faced by the public and ensuring better governance are among the government’s highest priorities. The Minister appreciated the important role played by NGOs and community-based organisations in maintaining social harmony, supporting development initiatives, and working for the welfare of the people.

The programme was also attended by Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, Deputy Commissioner of Mamit district, and Pu Manny Bhushan Singh, Superintendent of Police (SP), Mamit. Both officials assured the gathering that the district administration and police department are committed to addressing public grievances promptly and effectively.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER OF LAW AND JUSTICE IN MAMIT NGO LEH KHAWTLANG HRUAITUTE KAWM
content:
471/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 12th of May,2026:Vawiin khan Tourist Lodge, Mamit-ah Union Minister of Law and Justice Pu Arjun Ram Meghwal chuan Mamit khawtlang hruaitute leh NGO te a kawm.

Pu Arjun Ram Meghwal chuan MHIP, YMA,MUP, VC leh MZP hruaitute chu kawmin an harsatna te a ngaihthlak sak a, Sawrkar Laipuiin theih anga puih a tum thu sawiin mipuite harsatna sutkian chu Sawrkar in a tum ber a ni a ti. Union Minister hian NABARD hruaitute hmuin an hnathawh te a enpui bawk.

Vawiin hunah hian Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap leh Pu Manny Bhushan Singh, SP Mamit chu telin mipuiin harsatna an neih chu a rang lama bawhzui an tum thu sawiin harsatna an neihah te office pan hreh lo turin an fuih bawk.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB LEH BAIRABI TUILAK KAWP (COMBINED SCHEME) CHUNGCHANGAH PHED HOTUTEN TLAWNG LUI AN ENFIAH
content:
470/2026-2027

Kolasib, 12th May, 2026:Ni 8 May, 2026 (Zirtawpni) khan PHED Chief Engineer, Zone-I Er. Lalropuia leh Chief Engineer, Zone-II Er. K. Zohmingliana te chuan Kolasib leh Bairabi khaw tana Tlawng lui (Bairabi hrul) atanga tui lak theih dan tur a hmunah kalin an enfiah a. He hunah hian Er. Lalrosangi, Sr. Executive Engineer, Kolasib WATSAN Division, PHED bakah SDO leh JE ten an lo tawiawm a ni.

India sawrkar dan (norms) ah chuan Kolasib leh Bairabi te hi khawpui (Town) an nih avangin mi pakhatin nitin tui litre 135 an dawng tur a ni a. Tun dinhmunah Kolasib tana tui lak mekna Tuichhuahen atang chuan he tiang zat tui hi pek chhuah theih a nih hmel loh avangin, Tlawng lui hi rawn lak tel (pump) nise tih ngaihtuahna hi a lo awm tawh a ni.

Ruahmanna tlangpui ang chuan, Zamuang panna lei (bridge) bul vel atangin Tlawng lui tui hi pump tur a ni a. Bairabi khaw chung remchang hnaivaiah, Bairabi a luang thleng thei tur hmunah vawrh chhoh phawt beisei a ni. Chuta tang chuan Bairabi khuaah awlsam takin tui hi a luang thleng mai dawn a ni. Kolasib lam ve thung chu tui vawrh chhohna hmun atang hian Tuichhuahen Pump House awmsa bul hnaiah kilometer 23 vela thui pipe hmangin lak luh a ni ang a. Tuichhuahen atang hian Kolasib-a Pioneer Tlangah vawrh chhoh leh tur a ni dawn a ni.

He ruahmanna thar hi a puitling a nih chuan, tuna Kolasib tui pump mek chu hlui hlawn chuang lovin, a pahniha hmang kawpin Kolasib leh Bairabi mipuite chu kum 2058 (kum 30 lo awm tur) thleng harsa lo leh hnianghnar taka tui chawm thei tura beisei a ni.

He project lian tham tak atan hian a tlem berah cheng vaibelchhe 205 (Rs. 205 crores) vel mamawh tura duan chhin a ni a, detailed survey leh estimate siam a nih hunah a la pung thei bawk a ni. Sum mamawh zat a tam tham avangin sum hmuhna tur dap hna hi nasa taka thawh a la ngai dawn a. PHED chuan Kolasib leh Bairabi mipuite tana he project hi tihhlawhtlin sak ngei tumin theihtawpin hma a la chho mek a ni.

Attachment
